message.content:
Explore the BigIDE codebase to understand how project management and switching works. Look for:
1. Any UI or mechanism for switching between projects
2. Project management features
3. How projects are defined/configured
4. Any shortcuts or commands related to project switching

Search broadly - check HTML files, JS files, shell scripts, config files. Report what you find about the project structure and any project-switching functionality.

1‚Üí#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2‚Üí# BigIDE ‚Äî Project Picker con fzf
     3‚Üí# Naviga cartelle e apri progetti in nuovi tab tmux
     4‚Üí# Chiamato da tmux popup (prefix + a)
     5‚Üíset -euo pipefail
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíexport PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"
     8‚Üí
     9‚ÜíBIGIDE_HOME="${BIGIDE_HOME:-$HOME/.bigide}"
    10‚Üí_L() { printf '%s [EVENT] project-picker: %s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" "$*" >> "$BIGIDE_HOME/logs/bigide.log" 2>/dev/null || true; }
    11‚Üí
    12‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Auto-reload: se il repo ha una versione pi√π recente, esegui quella ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    13‚Üí_REPO_ROOT="$(cat "$BIGIDE_HOME/.repo_root" 2>/dev/null)" || true
    14‚Üíif [[ -n "$_REPO_ROOT" ]]; then
    15‚Üí  _REPO_SCRIPT="$_REPO_ROOT/config/scripts/project-picker.sh"
    16‚Üí  _SELF="${BASH_SOURCE[0]}"
    17‚Üí  if [[ -f "$_REPO_SCRIPT" && "$_SELF" != "$_REPO_SCRIPT" && "$_REPO_SCRIPT" -nt "$_SELF" ]]; then
    18‚Üí    exec bash "$_REPO_SCRIPT" "$@"
    19‚Üí  fi
    20‚Üí  BIGIDE_REPO_ROOT="$_REPO_ROOT"
    21‚Üíelse
    22‚Üí  BIGIDE_REPO_ROOT="__BIGIDE_REPO_ROOT__"
    23‚Üífi
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Sessione e directory corrente ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    26‚ÜíCURRENT_SESSION="$(tmux display-message -p '#S')"
    27‚ÜíSESSION_PATH="$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_path}' 2>/dev/null)" || SESSION_PATH="$HOME"
    28‚ÜíSESSION_PATH="${SESSION_PATH/#\~/$HOME}"
    29‚Üí# Se session_path √® $HOME, prova active-project-path
    30‚Üíif [[ "$SESSION_PATH" == "$HOME" ]]; then
    31‚Üí  _alt="$(cat "$HOME/.bigide/active-project-path" 2>/dev/null)" || true
    32‚Üí  [[ -n "$_alt" && -d "$_alt" ]] && SESSION_PATH="$_alt"
    33‚Üífi
    34‚ÜíCURRENT_DIR="$(dirname "$SESSION_PATH")"
    35‚Üí[[ -d "$CURRENT_DIR" ]] || CURRENT_DIR="$HOME"
    36‚Üí
    37‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Colori Tokyo Night (RGB) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    38‚ÜíGREEN=$'\033[38;2;158;206;106m'   # #9ece6a
    39‚ÜíBLUE=$'\033[38;2;122;162;247m'    # #7aa2f7
    40‚ÜíDIM=$'\033[38;2;86;95;137m'       # #565f89
    41‚ÜíWHITE=$'\033[38;2;192;202;245m'   # #c0caf5
    42‚ÜíRESET=$'\033[0m'
    43‚Üí
    44‚ÜíFZF_COLORS='bg:#1a1b26,bg+:#2e3c64,fg:#a9b1d6,fg+:#c0caf5,hl:#ff9e64,hl+:#ff9e64,border:#3b4261,header:#565f89,prompt:#7aa2f7,pointer:#7aa2f7,marker:#9ece6a,info:#565f89'
    45‚Üí
    46‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Helper: nome sessione BigIDE per un path ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    47‚Üí_session_name() {
    48‚Üí  local base
    49‚Üí  base="$(basename "$1")"
    50‚Üí  echo "bigide-${base//[^[:alnum:]]/-}"
    51‚Üí}
    52‚Üí
    53‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Helper: controlla se sessione tmux esiste ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    54‚Üí_session_exists() {
    55‚Üí  tmux has-session -t "$1" 2>/dev/null
    56‚Üí}
    57‚Üí
    58‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Helper: controlla se window con nome esiste nella sessione corrente ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    59‚Üí_window_exists() {
    60‚Üí  tmux list-windows -t "$CURRENT_SESSION" -F '#W' 2>/dev/null | grep -qxF "$1"
    61‚Üí}
    62‚Üí
    63‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Crea nuovo tab con layout BigIDE completo ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    64‚Üí_open_project_tab() {
    65‚Üí  local project_path="$1"
    66‚Üí  local project_name
    67‚Üí  project_name="$(basename "$project_path")"
    68‚Üí
    69‚Üí  # Se tab con questo nome esiste gi√Ý, switch ad esso
    70‚Üí  if _window_exists "$project_name"; then
    71‚Üí    tmux select-window -t "${CURRENT_SESSION}:=${project_name}"
    72‚Üí    return 0
    73‚Üí  fi
    74‚Üí
    75‚Üí  # Carica percentuali dal layout default
    76‚Üí  local layout_file="$BIGIDE_HOME/layouts/default.json"
    77‚Üí  local claude_pct=80 lower_pct=35 git_lines=1
    78‚Üí  if [[ -f "$layout_file" ]] && command -v jq &>/dev/null; then
    79‚Üí    claude_pct="$(jq -r '.panes[] | select(.id=="claude") | .widthPercent' "$layout_file" 2>/dev/null)" || claude_pct=80
    80‚Üí    lower_pct="$(jq -r '.panes[] | select(.id=="terminal") | .heightPercent' "$layout_file" 2>/dev/null)" || lower_pct=35
    81‚Üí    git_lines="$(jq -r '.panes[] | select(.id=="gitbar") | .heightLines // 1' "$layout_file" 2>/dev/null)" || git_lines=1
    82‚Üí  fi
    83‚Üí
    84‚Üí  # Nuovo window
    85‚Üí  tmux new-window -t "$CURRENT_SESSION" -n "$project_name" -c "$project_path"
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üí  local full_pane
    88‚Üí  full_pane="$(tmux display-message -p -t "${CURRENT_SESSION}:=${project_name}" '#{pane_id}')"
    89‚Üí
    90‚Üí  # 1. Git bar in fondo
    91‚Üí  local gitbar_pane
    92‚Üí  gitbar_pane="$(tmux split-window -v -l "$git_lines" -t "$full_pane" -c "$project_path" -P -F '#{pane_id}')"
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí  # 2. Split orizzontale: filetree (sx) | area destra (dx)
    95‚Üí  local right_top_id
    96‚Üí  right_top_id="$(tmux split-window -h -p "$claude_pct" -t "$full_pane" -c "$project_path" -P -F '#{pane_id}')"
    97‚Üí  local left_top_id="$full_pane"
    98‚Üí
    99‚Üí  # 3. Split verticale colonna destra: claude (alto) | area-bassa (basso)
   100‚Üí  local terminal_pane_id
   101‚Üí  terminal_pane_id="$(tmux split-window -v -p "$lower_pct" -t "$right_top_id" -c "$project_path" -P -F '#{pane_id}')"
   102‚Üí
   103‚Üí  # 4. Split orizzontale area-bassa: terminal (sx) | logs (dx)
   104‚Üí  local logs_pane_id
   105‚Üí  logs_pane_id="$(tmux split-window -v -p 50 -t "$terminal_pane_id" -c "$project_path" -P -F '#{pane_id}')"
   106‚Üí
   107‚Üí  sleep 1
   108‚Üí
   109‚Üí  # Marca pane con ruolo
   110‚Üí  tmux set-option -p -t "$left_top_id"      @bigide_pane_type "yazi"
   111‚Üí  tmux set-option -p -t "$right_top_id"     @bigide_pane_type "claude"
   112‚Üí  tmux set-option -p -t "$terminal_pane_id" @bigide_pane_type "terminal"
   113‚Üí  tmux set-option -p -t "$logs_pane_id"     @bigide_pane_type "logs"
   114‚Üí  tmux set-option -p -t "$gitbar_pane"      @bigide_pane_type "gitbar"
   115‚Üí
   116‚Üí  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Per-window state: runner + project path ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   117‚Üí  local win_id
   118‚Üí  win_id="$(tmux display-message -p -t "${CURRENT_SESSION}:=${project_name}" '#{window_id}')"
   119‚Üí  tmux set-option -w -t "$win_id" @bigide_project_path "$project_path"
   120‚Üí  local default_runner
   121‚Üí  default_runner="$(cat "$BIGIDE_HOME/active-runner" 2>/dev/null)" || default_runner="anthropic"
   122‚Üí  [[ -z "$default_runner" ]] && default_runner="anthropic"
   123‚Üí  tmux set-option -w -t "$win_id" @bigide_runner "$default_runner"
   124‚Üí  local display_name
   125‚Üí  case "$default_runner" in
   126‚Üí    anthropic) display_name="claude" ;;
   127‚Üí    openai)    display_name="codex" ;;
   128‚Üí    gemini)    display_name="gemini" ;;
   129‚Üí    *)         display_name="$default_runner" ;;
   130‚Üí  esac
   131‚Üí  tmux set-option -w -t "$win_id" @bigide_runner_display "$display_name"
   132‚Üí
   133‚Üí  # Avvio strumenti ‚Äî tutti puntano al progetto selezionato
   134‚Üí  tmux send-keys -t "$left_top_id"      "cd '${project_path}' && clear && \$HOME/.bigide/scripts/filetree.sh" C-m
   135‚Üí  { sleep 5 && tmux resize-pane -t "$left_top_id" -x 41 2>/dev/null && sleep 0.2 && tmux resize-pane -t "$left_top_id" -x 40 2>/dev/null; } &
   136‚Üí  tmux send-keys -t "$right_top_id"     "cd '${project_path}' && clear && BIGIDE_WINDOW='${win_id}' \$HOME/.bigide/scripts/launch-claude.sh" C-m
   137‚Üí  tmux send-keys -t "$terminal_pane_id" "cd '${project_path}' && clear && exec zsh" C-m
   138‚Üí  tmux send-keys -t "$logs_pane_id"     "clear; \$HOME/.bigide/scripts/log-viewer.sh" C-m
   139‚Üí  tmux send-keys -t "$gitbar_pane"      "while true; do bash \$HOME/.bigide/scripts/git-bar.sh '${project_path}' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; done" C-m
   140‚Üí
   141‚Üí  # Resize hook per il nuovo window
   142‚Üí  tmux set-hook -t "$CURRENT_SESSION" client-resized \
   143‚Üí    "run-shell 'bash \$HOME/.bigide/scripts/resize-layout.sh \"${win_id}\"'"
   144‚Üí
   145‚Üí  # Resize esplicito ‚Äî applica subito il layout corretto
   146‚Üí  bash "$HOME/.bigide/scripts/resize-layout.sh" "$win_id" 2>/dev/null || true
   147‚Üí
   148‚Üí  # Seleziona claude come pane attivo
   149‚Üí  tmux select-pane -t "$right_top_id"
   150‚Üí}
   151‚Üí
   152‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Loop principale di navigazione ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   153‚Üínavigate() {
   154‚Üí  local dir="$1"
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üí  while true; do
   157‚Üí    # Costruisci lista con colori ANSI
   158‚Üí    local entries=()
   159‚Üí    entries+=("${BLUE}+${RESET}  Nuova cartella")
   160‚Üí    [[ "$dir" != "/" ]] && entries+=("${DIM}..${RESET} Cartella superiore")
   161‚Üí
   162‚Üí    while IFS= read -r folder; do
   163‚Üí      [[ -z "$folder" ]] && continue
   164‚Üí      local name
   165‚Üí      name="$(basename "$folder")"
   166‚Üí      [[ "$name" == .* ]] && continue
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üí      local session_name
   169‚Üí      session_name="$(_session_name "$folder")"
   170‚Üí      if _session_exists "$session_name" || _window_exists "$name"; then
   171‚Üí        entries+=("${GREEN}‚óè${RESET}  ${WHITE}${name}${RESET}")
   172‚Üí      else
   173‚Üí        entries+=("   ${name}")
   174‚Üí      fi
   175‚Üí    done < <(find "$dir" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | sort)
   176‚Üí
   177‚Üí    local short_dir="${dir/#$HOME/\~}"
   178‚Üí
   179‚Üí    local selected
   180‚Üí    selected=$(printf '%s\n' "${entries[@]}" | fzf \
   181‚Üí      --height=100% \
   182‚Üí      --layout=reverse \
   183‚Üí      --border=rounded \
   184‚Üí      --prompt=" Progetti  " \
   185‚Üí      --pointer="‚ñ∂" \
   186‚Üí      --marker="‚óè" \
   187‚Üí      --header=" ${short_dir}   Enter entra  ‚îÇ  Ctrl-O apri progetto  ‚îÇ  Esc chiudi" \
   188‚Üí      --expect=ctrl-o \
   189‚Üí      --color="$FZF_COLORS" \
   190‚Üí      --no-multi \
   191‚Üí      --ansi \
   192‚Üí    ) || return 0
   193‚Üí
   194‚Üí    # Parsing output fzf con --expect: riga 1 = tasto, riga 2+ = selezione
   195‚Üí    local key line
   196‚Üí    IFS= read -r key <<< "$selected"
   197‚Üí    line="$(tail -n +2 <<< "$selected")"
   198‚Üí
   199‚Üí    _L "fzf: key=[$key] line=[$line]"
   200‚Üí    [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
   201‚Üí
   202‚Üí    # Rimuovi codici ANSI per il matching
   203‚Üí    local clean
   204‚Üí    clean="$(sed $'s/\033\\[[0-9;]*m//g' <<< "$line")"
   205‚Üí
   206‚Üí    # ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Estrai nome cartella (rimuovi indicatore ‚óè e spazi) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   207‚Üí    local folder_name
   208‚Üí    folder_name="$(echo "$clean" | sed 's/^[‚óè+ ]*//' | xargs)"
   209‚Üí
   210‚Üí    # ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Ctrl-O ‚Üí apri progetto (check PRIMA del contenuto) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   211‚Üí    if [[ "$key" == "ctrl-o" ]]; then
   212‚Üí      local target="$dir/$folder_name"
   213‚Üí      # Se il target selezionato non √® una cartella valida, apri $dir (la cartella corrente)
   214‚Üí      if [[ ! -d "$target" ]]; then
   215‚Üí        target="$dir"
   216‚Üí      fi
   217‚Üí      _L "ctrl-o: opening [$target] (session=$CURRENT_SESSION)"
   218‚Üí      _open_project_tab "$target" 2>>"$BIGIDE_HOME/logs/bigide.log" || _L "ERROR: _open_project_tab failed: $?"
   219‚Üí      return 0
   220‚Üí    fi
   221‚Üí
   222‚Üí    # ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Enter: gestisci in base al contenuto ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   223‚Üí    if [[ "$clean" == *"Nuova cartella"* ]]; then
   224‚Üí      local new_name=""
   225‚Üí      printf "${BLUE}"
   226‚Üí      read -r -p "  Nome: " new_name
   227‚Üí      printf "${RESET}"
   228‚Üí      if [[ -n "$new_name" ]]; then
   229‚Üí        mkdir -p "$dir/$new_name"
   230‚Üí      fi
   231‚Üí      continue
   232‚Üí    fi
   233‚Üí
   234‚Üí    if [[ "$clean" == *"Cartella superiore"* ]]; then
   235‚Üí      dir="$(dirname "$dir")"
   236‚Üí      continue
   237‚Üí    fi
   238‚Üí
   239‚Üí    local target="$dir/$folder_name"
   240‚Üí    if [[ -d "$target" ]]; then
   241‚Üí      dir="$target"
   242‚Üí    fi
   243‚Üí  done
   244‚Üí}
   245‚Üí
   246‚Üínavigate "$CURRENT_DIR"
   247‚Üí

1‚Üí#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2‚Üí# BigIDE ‚Äî Ricerca file fuzzy con fzf
     3‚Üí# Seleziona un file ‚Üí lo apre nella preview di neo-tree
     4‚Üí# Chiamato da tmux popup (prefix + Spazio)
     5‚Üíset -euo pipefail
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíexport PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üí_L() { printf '%s [EVENT] %s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" "$*" >> "$HOME/.bigide/logs/bigide.log" 2>/dev/null || true; }
    10‚Üí
    11‚Üí# Assicura cwd = root progetto (il popup potrebbe non ereditarlo)
    12‚Üí# Per-window: prova @bigide_project_path dal window corrente
    13‚Üí_PROJECT=""
    14‚Üíif [[ -n "${BIGIDE_WINDOW:-}" ]]; then
    15‚Üí  _PROJECT="$(tmux show-option -wqv -t "$BIGIDE_WINDOW" @bigide_project_path 2>/dev/null)" || true
    16‚Üífi
    17‚Üí# Fallback: session_path
    18‚Üíif [[ -z "$_PROJECT" || "$_PROJECT" == "$HOME" ]]; then
    19‚Üí  _PROJECT="$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_path}' 2>/dev/null)" || true
    20‚Üí  _PROJECT="${_PROJECT/#\~/$HOME}"
    21‚Üífi
    22‚Üí# Fallback: file globale
    23‚Üíif [[ -z "$_PROJECT" || "$_PROJECT" == "$HOME" ]]; then
    24‚Üí  _PROJECT="$(cat "$HOME/.bigide/active-project-path" 2>/dev/null)" || true
    25‚Üífi
    26‚Üí[[ -n "$_PROJECT" && -d "$_PROJECT" ]] && cd "$_PROJECT" 2>/dev/null || true
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí_L "file-search: opened in $(pwd)"
    29‚Üí
    30‚ÜíRESULT_FILE="/tmp/bigide-fzf-result"
    31‚Üírm -f "$RESULT_FILE"
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üíselected=$(find . \

    42‚Üí  -not -path '*/.tmp/*' \

    45‚Üí  -not -path '*/.build/*' \
    46‚Üí  -not -path '*/target/*' \
    47‚Üí  -not -name '.DS_Store' \
    48‚Üí  -type f \
